'''latunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placodont|placodont]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placodont|placodont]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| latunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lætinith|lætinith]] || [[word:lætinij|lætinij]] || [[word:lætinish|lætinish]] || [[word:lætini|lætini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:latutunuth|latutunuth]] || [[word:latutunuj|latutunuj]] || [[word:latutunush|latutunush]] || [[word:latutunu|latutunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:latunuth|latunuth]] || [[word:latunuj|latunuj]] || [[word:latunush|latunush]] || [[word:latunu|latunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:latufnuth|latufnuth]] || [[word:latufnuj|latufnuj]] || [[word:latufnush|latufnush]] || [[word:latufnuf|latufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:latunuthu|latunuthu]] || [[word:latunuju|latunuju]] || [[word:latunushu|latunushu]] || [[word:latunuku|latunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:latunuth|latunuth]] || [[word:latunuj|latunuj]] || [[word:latunush|latunush]] || [[word:latunu|latunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:latunuthul|latunuthul]] || [[word:latunujul|latunujul]] || [[word:latunushul|latunushul]] || [[word:latunukul|latunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:latunuthuthu|latunuthuthu]] || [[word:latunujuju|latunujuju]] || [[word:latunushushu|latunushushu]] || [[word:latunuku|latunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:latunuthun|latunuthun]] || [[word:latunujun|latunujun]] || [[word:latunushun|latunushun]] || [[word:latunukun|latunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:latunuthuoro|latunuthuoro]] || [[word:latunujuoro|latunujuoro]] || [[word:latunushuoro|latunushuoro]] || [[word:latunukuoro|latunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
